languages.text: {n}Полковник отражает первый удар, второй, третий. Но вы оказываетесь быстрее — и четвертый он пропускает на доли мгновения.{/n}
{n}The colonel deflects the first strike, the second, and the third. But you are faster, and he misses the fourth one by a fraction of a second.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Полковник отражает первый удар, второй, третий. Но вы оказываетесь быстрее — и четвертый он пропускает на доли мгновения.{/n}

languages.text: {n}大佐は最初の攻撃、2つ目の攻撃、3つ目の攻撃をかわす。しかし、あなたはもっと速く、大佐は4つ目の攻撃をわずかにかわす。大佐の頬に赤い傷ができた。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel deflects the first strike, the second, and the third. But you are faster, and he misses the fourth one by a fraction of a second. A scarlet streak appears on his cheek.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 大佐は最初の攻撃、2つ目の攻撃、3つ目の攻撃をかわす。しかし、あなたはもっと速く、大佐は4つ目の攻撃をわずかにかわす。大佐の頬に赤い傷ができた。

languages.text: {n}Le colonel pare le premier coup, le deuxième puis le troisième, mais vous êtes plus rapide et il manque le quatrième d'une fraction de seconde.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel deflects the first strike, the second, and the third. But you are faster, and he misses the fourth one by a fraction of a second.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le colonel pare le premier coup, le deuxième puis le troisième, mais vous êtes plus rapide et il manque le quatrième d'une fraction de seconde.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Albay ilk, ikinci ve üçüncü hamleleri savuşturuyor. Fakat sen daha hızlı olduğundan dördüncüsünü saliseyle kaçırıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel deflects the first strike, the second, and the third. But you are faster, and he misses the fourth one by a fraction of a second.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Albay ilk, ikinci ve üçüncü hamleleri savuşturuyor. Fakat sen daha hızlı olduğundan dördüncüsünü saliseyle kaçırıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Colonel wehrt deine drei ersten Angriffe ab. Aber du bist schneller und so verfehlt er deinen vierten Angriff um den Bruchteil einer Sekunde.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel deflects the first strike, the second, and the third. But you are faster, and he misses the fourth one by a fraction of a second.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Colonel wehrt deine drei ersten Angriffe ab. Aber du bist schneller und so verfehlt er deinen vierten Angriff um den Bruchteil einer Sekunde.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El coronel desvía el primer golpe, el segundo y el tercero. Pero eres más rápid{mf|o|a}, y, por una fracción de segundo, no consigue evitar el cuarto.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel deflects the first strike, the second, and the third. But you are faster, and he misses the fourth one by a fraction of a second.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El coronel desvía el primer golpe, el segundo y el tercero. Pero eres más rápid{mf|o|a}, y, por una fracción de segundo, no consigue evitar el cuarto.{/n}

languages.text: {n}上校挡开了第一击、第二击和第三击。但你更快，毫厘之间，他没能挡住第四击。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel deflects the first strike, the second, and the third. But you are faster, and he misses the fourth one by a fraction of a second.{/n}
